name: VICOR CORP.  DL-,01
summary: VICOR CORP. DL-,01 designs, develops, manufactures, and markets modular power components and power systems for converting, regulating and controlling electric current. It serves diverse markets including enterprise and high-performance computing, industrial equipment and automation, telecom and datacom infrastructure, vehicles and transportation, aerospace and defense. The company is headquartered in Andover, Massachusetts.
